description: MCPDS is a tool-agnostic, declarative format for describing MCP servers. This repository contains the canonical MCPDS schema, TypeScript types, examples, and human-readable specification for the @mcpds/spec npm package.
rules: Prefer schemas/mcpds-1.0.0.md for the human-readable MCPDS specification.
Use src/schema/mcpds-schema.ts as the canonical TypeScript schema source.
Use schemas/mcpds-1.0.schema.json for JSON Schema validation examples.
Use examples/example.mcp.yaml as the main complete MCPDS reference document.
Keep MCPDS aligned with the Model Context Protocol specification and avoid documenting fields outside the MCPDS schema.
